signals.headline: Sage acquires Doyen AI to accelerate finance-software implementations
signals.summary: On 28 April Sage acquired Doyen AI, a 2024-founded AI startup that automates customer onboarding, data migration and implementation for finance teams. Sage says the technology will compress Sage Intacct/Sage 200 go-lives from weeks to "just a few days" by automatically extracting, mapping and validating financial data from legacy systems. Wilson Sonsini advised Doyen AI. Tightens the AI implementation moat in Sage's core UK/EU/North America mid-market.

signals.headline: Vertex announces 9% workforce reduction and AI-led Value Creation Plan
signals.summary: On 28 April Vertex (NASDAQ: VERX) board approved a global "Value Creation Plan" — a ~9% workforce reduction (≈170 employees) with $6–8M in pre-tax restructuring charges, paired with a sharpened reinvestment thesis around AI-enabled tax compliance. Signal of broader pressure on legacy tax-engine vendors (Avalara, Sovos, Vertex) to retool around agentic AI as Avalara, Fonoa and others lean in.

signals.headline: Airwallex launches "Who Are Ya?" — Spike Lee Arsenal FC campaign
signals.summary: On 25 April Airwallex launched "Who Are Ya?" — its largest-ever ad campaign — a two-minute Spike Lee–directed short film tied to its Arsenal FC official software partnership. Phased rollout across the Premier League run-in, the 2026 World Cup in the US, and the start of the 26/27 season. Signals continued aggressive brand spend in UK/EU as Airwallex pushes upmarket against Stripe and into B2B finance tooling that overlaps with QuickBooks Money/Bill Pay use cases.

signals.headline: Avalara announces 2025 Partner Awards and enterprise property-tax research
signals.summary: On 28 April Avalara announced its 2025 Partner Award winners (Consulting Partner, Accountant Firm, Implementation Excellence, Rising Star categories) and published new research finding property-tax compliance now exceeds six figures annually for most large enterprises. Modest signal, but reinforces Avalara's accountant-channel push and enterprise upmarket positioning while Vertex restructures.
